ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was listed on the stock exchange */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "industry_segment" TEXT /* More specific industry classification for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's password expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial statement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial statement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the financial statement (e.g., web, API, mobile app) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the financial statement was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial indicator */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the financial indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial indicator (e.g., P/E Ratio, ROE) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial indicator */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the financial report */,
  "fiscal_period" TEXT /* Fiscal period of the financial report (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the financial indicator */,
  "indicator_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the financial indicator (e.g., percentage, ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_indicators_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data point */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., Market Index, Economic Indicator) */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the data point (e.g., S&P 500, GDP) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the data report */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Bloomberg, FRED) */,
  "data_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the external data (e.g., Bloomberg, Quandl) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the external data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Quarterly Analysis, Annual Report) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "report_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the news article belongs to */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "news_headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry for which the benchmark applies */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark (e.g., average revenue growth) */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Value of the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating_agency" TEXT /* Rating agency that assigned the rating */,
  "rating_value" TEXT /* Actual rating value (e.g., AAA, BBB+) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_ratings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
